retry_reason: The put operation reduces a refcount; failure would indicate a double-free or use-after-free scenario, making retries dangerous and meaningless.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases the smem_state reference stored in ab_ahb->smp2p_info.smem_state. The release only occurs if the smp2p_wow_exit hardware parameter is true, indicating that the reference was previously acquired and needs to be freed during teardown. After this call, the smem_state pointer must not be used. The function does not return a value; the caller is responsible for ensuring the reference is valid when the condition is met.
